name: Drop Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, then add salt.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring to combine well.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased or oiled baking sheet.
5. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. These biscuits can be split and topped with butter and fruit for a shortcake.
14 servings. The Household Searchlight - 1941
